economic_notes: Deton'Cho Corporation (100% owned GBE) reported total revenue of $53,775,945 and net income of $1,319,481 for 2021. Deton'Cho Management Limited Partnership (99.99% owned GBE) reported total revenue of $3,537,813. Combined GBE equity earnings of $2,059,530 recognized. First Nation guarantees BMO credit facilities for Bouwa Whee Catering Ltd ($2,000,000) and Deton'Cho Management LP ($3,658,959, outstanding $1,829,495). COVID-19 response funding of $862,269 received from ISC.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unaudited/reviewed-only financial statements of multiple DCC subsidiaries and investees, making it impossible to determine whether adjustments to equity earnings and investment values are necessary for both 2021 and 2020. First Nation is located in Northwest Territories (NT), not a province. Consolidated entities include Housing Division and Weledeh Building Society; GBEs (Deton'Cho Corporation and Deton'Cho Management LP) accounted for on modified equity basis. Annual surplus of $5,591,327 includes $2,059,530 equity earnings from GBEs and $1,172,981 transfer to tangible capital assets as 'other items' beyond operating surplus of $2,358,816. Contribution to Gosoomba dehshe Trust (2017) of $2,791,589 reduces accumulated surplus directly. Non-compliance noted with MACA policies for Gas Tax and CPI restricted cash reserve deposits. No long-term debt identified on face of statements. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text. Chief and Council wages paid as related party expense totaled $189,614.
